ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the business belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the business */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of the business */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the business was established */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the business logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the business */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Cuisine type (if applicable) */,
  "service_types" TEXT /* Service types offered by the business */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the business is featured */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, business owner, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business owner */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the owner is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ownership record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ownership record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is approved */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the listing was created */,
  "listing_text" TEXT /* Text of the listing */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the listing is active */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the listing has received */,
  "is_promoted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the listing is promoted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media profile */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the profile belongs to */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Handle of the business on the social media platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the social media profile was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was created */,
  "promotion_text" TEXT /* Text of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion ends */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the promotion is active */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the promotion has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the analytics belong to */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were generated */,
  "analytics_text" TEXT /* Text of the analytics */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Numerical value of the metric */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the analytics are visible to the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is visible to the business */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subscription is active */,
  "unsubscribed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subscription was unsubscribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the message was sent to */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the message has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the message has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
